official_reference_evidence.claim: The pants are hand-crafted in cream tweed with multicoloured flecks, a multicoloured braided drawcord, and fringed hems.
The pants have an adjustable elastic waist and are designed for a relaxed, baggy fit.
The women's sizes are XS-S for EU 34-38, M for EU 38-40, and L-XL for EU 42-44.
The standard length is 110 cm from waistband to hem.
The pants are dry-clean only, and the delicate tweed should be kept away from rough surfaces and accessories that may snag it.

evidence.title: Replying to @MrVegas One sentence has probably cost buyers thousands of dollars... "We're walking away." I see this happen more often than y
evidence.text: Replying to @MrVegas One sentence has probably cost buyers thousands of dollars... "We're walking away." I see this happen more often than y — This one sentence costs buyers the house all the time. It's, we're ready to walk away. See this happen all the time. The buyer makes an offer, the seller counters, and the buyer gets super frustrated and suddenly wants to walk away over a few thousand dollars that probably could have been worked out. Here's what I've Learned after helping hundreds of buyers. Negotiation isn't just one conversation. Sometimes you have to offer and counter offer. A couple times I. And we say, do not let the offer die on our lawn. I've seen buyers keep negotiating and save thousands. And if they wouldn't have, then they would have walked away and not gotten the house that they really wanted.... — Replying to @MrVegas One sentence has probably cost buyers thousands of dollars... "We're walking away." I see this happen more often than you might think. A buyer writes an offer. The seller counters. The buyer gets frustrated because they didn't get exactly what they wanted. And suddenly they're ready to walk away. Here's what I've learned after negotiating hundreds of transactions. Don't let the deal die too quickly. Real estate negotiations are rarely one conversation. Sometimes it's two. Sometimes it's three. Sometimes it's four or five. And sometimes one more counteroffer is all it takes to get everyone where they want to be. relationship_decision.rationale: Current-run evidence repeatedly connects both product worlds to the same buyer moment, so the free product creates the visible first impression and Auralo completes the getting-ready ritual.
